name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝗻𝘂𝗶𝘀𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 | "whatcha thinkin' about? Is it me?" | he just loves annoying you. ㅤ *** ㅤ HAPPY BIRTHDAY [MELANIE](https://janitorai.com/profiles/cdb76af4-c4b5-49f0-a2bf-719035848003_profile-of-melanie-0405)!!! So INCREDIBLY short but I like the dialogue piece here sooooo 😓 I think this might be another series where Satoru is just being annoying, like how my "oh baby" bots are about pregnancy? Idk yettt 😛

ㅤ

ㅤ ㅤ

𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗠𝗬 𝗕𝗢𝗧𝗦 ⇊

𝗛𝗢𝗪 𝗧𝗢 𝗚𝗜𝗩𝗘 𝗦𝗨𝗚𝗚𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦 ⇊

𝗨𝗣𝗗𝗔𝗧𝗘𝗦/𝗢𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗥 ⇊

𝗕𝗢𝗧 𝗤𝗨𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦 ⇊ ㅤ

ㅤ

**𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗠𝗬 𝗕𝗢𝗧𝗦!**

***(General info on my bots.)*** - I primarily use JLLM. - I do NOT take requests, only suggestions. - I only take suggestions through my google form, curious cat, or tumblr (please make sure to read the rules as well). - I make only any pov or fem pov bots. - All of my bots are self-indulgent, meaning I only make bots I myself would use. - Many of my bots are left vague on purpose so different dynamics can be used. ㅤ *** ㅤ **𝗪𝗔𝗡𝗡𝗔 𝗚𝗜𝗩𝗘 𝗔 𝗕𝗢𝗧 𝗦𝗨𝗚𝗚𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡?** ***(Please do not leave requests in my reviews AND make sure to read my suggestion rules on either my google form or tumblr.)*** [google form](https://forms.gle/P4j6F6kNvapuXRnn7) [curious cat](https://curiouscat.live/downhorendous) [tumblr](https://www.tumblr.com/downwhorendous?source=share) ㅤ *** ㅤ **𝗢𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗥 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦!** ***(Keep up with me!)*** [announcements/updates](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Ni__25Lrg3zljt5tGKMGuqNKVbNZyvszFs3JUwjGXrA/edit?usp=drivesdk) [my WIPS](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1zs4ajpEiVUsoBs7fHBK3RlRsUGuL_49h6VVNKdejCTY/edit?usp=drivesdk) [editing assistance](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1BEGSeWmxslONXXSas6tit13WgG4Z5fykFCPN8fbskcA/edit?usp=drivesdk) [kofi](https://ko-fi.com/downhorendously) [spotify pl](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1d8TO1ZBNKNvt1fIdpW9Ws?si=LwvwcuebRI6_O5MH4fEMGA) ㅤ *** ㅤ **𝗕𝗢𝗧 𝗤𝗡𝗔 .** ***(Some common complaints about bots.)*** **“It keeps talking for me!”** *AI problem, I can put “{{char}} will never speak for {{user}}” and other variations (which I do), and the AI will still speak for you; nothing I can fix on my end + if you keep giving short/dry responses, the bot will absolutely speak for you in an attempt to push the plot forward!* **“The bot keeps misgendering me!”** *I believe most of my bots are any pov, if they are, they will be tagged as so. My filth posts are all FEM pov.* *If the bot keeps misgendering you, then that's on the AI. Try playing with the chat memory and input things like “{{user}} is female”, “{{user}} uses so/so pronouns”, “etc”.* **“The bot is being oversexual/violent!”** *AI problem, it's super annoying, I know, “in one swift motion” makes me wanna rip my hair out. And no, I don't know why it's dick is hard all the time…or why it's slamming you against a wall.* **“The bot keeps repeating itself!”** *AI problem, do you think I'm putting “repeat yourself constantly” in the code 😭?* *Similar to the “bot keeps talking for me problem,” I can input “be creative/never repeat” and whatever else- the AI will still have such issues.* **"The bot is talking crazy/nonsense!"** *AI problem, lord have mercy on us all. I'm so tired of them trying to get me pregnant or randomly pulling a gun on me too.* **In essence, what I'm trying to say here is most RP problems stem from the AI itself. You can leave reviews about it if you want, but there's nothing I can do on *my* end to fix it. The LLM is in beta and will have changes/updates, we all just have to be patient and wait ♡** ㅤ *** ㅤ #downwhorendous
creator: downwhorendous
